title: Axolotl Villagers SFX
description: ♡ This resource pack swaps: Villagers SFX ➜ Axolotl SFX!! ♬
body:
![♡](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99a6a0a4e4a396a4c5711a8fcdcba54e7caef2d5.png)

## ♡ Axolotl Villagers **(but with sounds!)** ♡
⁣
> A simple **Resource Pack** that swaps **Default Villagers SFX** with Original Minecraft Axolotl sounds!

⁣ Goes with the [Axolotl Villagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axolotl-villagers) **Texture pack** by [Raphaxolotlz](https://modrinth.com/user/Raphaxolotlz)

⁣

I hope this is okay! and I hope everyone have as much fun as I do with the Axolotl immersion! ♡

⁣

### ♡ A Special Thanks to [@Raphaxolotlz](https://modrinth.com/user/Raphaxolotlz) ♡
For making one of the cutest Villagers ResourcePack out there!! ♡
